name: siRNA-Mediated Gene Knockdown
nameCn: siRNA 基因沉默（RNAi 干扰）

components.name: 1. Design siRNA: order 2–3 independent siRNAs per target gene

note.en: 19–21 nt duplex with 2 nt 3' overhangs. Sources: Qiagen, Dharmacon, IDT. Resuspend 20 µM in RNase-free water; store −80°C.
note.zh: 19–21 nt 双链，3' 端 2 nt 突出。来源：Qiagen、Dharmacon、IDT。RNase-free 水溶解至 20 µM；−80°C 保存。

components.name: 2. Day 0: seed cells in antibiotic-free media

note.en: 24-well: 5–8×10⁴ cells; 6-well: 2–4×10⁵; 10 cm: 1.5–2×10⁶. Target 40–70% confluency at transfection.
Tube A: 3 µL RNAiMAX + 47 µL Opti-MEM, 5 min RT. Tube B: 1 µL siRNA (20 µM) + 49 µL Opti-MEM. Combine A+B, mix gently, 20 min RT. [24-well scale; final siRNA ~20 nM].
note.zh: 管 A：3 µL RNAiMAX + 47 µL Opti-MEM，RT 5 min。管 B：1 µL siRNA（20 µM）+ 49 µL Opti-MEM。A+B 混合，轻混，RT 20 min。[24 孔规模；siRNA 终浓度 ~20 nM]。

components.name: 4. Add complex dropwise to cells; gentle plate rocking

note.en: Remove old media; add 400 µL fresh (no antibiotics) + 100 µL complex = 500 µL total. Do NOT change media for 6 h.
note.zh: 去旧培养基；加 400 µL 新鲜培养基（无抗生素）+ 100 µL 复合物 = 500 µL。6 h 内不换液。

note.en: 48 h: fast-turnover proteins. 72 h: most targets. 96 h + re-transfection at 48 h: stable proteins.
note.zh: 48 h：快速周转蛋白。72 h：大多数靶标。96 h + 48 h 时再转染：稳定蛋白。

note.en: qpcr_protocol for mRNA (≥70% reduction expected). wb_protocol for protein (≥60% reduction). Include siNC + siGAPDH controls.
note.zh: qpcr_protocol 检测 mRNA（预期 ≥70% 下调）。wb_protocol 检测蛋白（预期 ≥60% 下调）。对照：siNC + siGAPDH。

note.en: Proliferation: cck8_proliferation; Migration: scratch_assay/transwell_migration; Apoptosis: annexin_v_apoptosis.

notes.en: Controls: (1) siNC (non-targeting); (2) siGAPDH (positive KD); (3) untreated; (4) lipid-only (toxicity). Toxicity high? Reduce RNAiMAX to 1.5 µL/well. Hard-to-transfect cells: Nucleofection, electroporation, or lentiviral shRNA.
notes.zh: 对照：(1) siNC（非靶向）；(2) siGAPDH（阳性 KD）；(3) 未处理；(4) 仅脂质体（毒性）。毒性大？减少 RNAiMAX 至 1.5 µL/孔。难转染细胞：核转染、电穿孔或慢病毒 shRNA。

ref: Elbashir et al. (2001) Nature 411:494–498; Reynolds et al. (2004) Nat Biotechnol 22:326; Qiagen siRNA Transfection Handbook

briefSteps.en: Design 2–3 siRNAs per target → seed cells in antibiotic-free medium → prepare siRNA-RNAiMAX complex in Opti-MEM → add to cells → incubate 48–72 h → verify knockdown by qPCR and/or WB → run functional assays
briefSteps.zh: 设计 2–3 条靶向 siRNA → 无抗生素培养基铺板 → Opti-MEM 中制备 siRNA-RNAiMAX 复合物 → 加入细胞 → 孵育 48–72 h → qPCR/WB 验证敲低效率 → 开展功能实验

detailedSteps.en: Design or order 2–3 independent siRNAs per target gene (19–21 nt duplexes with 2 nt 3' overhangs). Include a non-targeting control (siNC) and a positive knockdown control (e.g., siGAPDH). Resuspend lyophilised siRNA in RNase-free water to 20 µM; aliquot and store at −80°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 针对每个靶基因设计或订购 2–3 条独立 siRNA（19–21 nt 双链，3' 端 2 nt 突出）。包含非靶向对照（siNC）和阳性敲低对照（如 siGAPDH）。冻干 siRNA 用 RNase-free 水溶解至 20 µM，分装后 −80°C 保存。

detailedSteps.en: Day 0: Seed cells in antibiotic-free complete medium. 24-well: 5–8×10⁴ cells; 6-well: 2–4×10⁵ cells; 10 cm dish: 1.5–2×10⁶ cells. Target 40–70% confluency at transfection (Day 1).
detailedSteps.zh: Day 0：将细胞接种于不含抗生素的完全培养基中。24 孔板：5–8×10⁴；6 孔板：2–4×10⁵；10 cm 皿：1.5–2×10⁶。目标转染时（Day 1）汇合度为 40–70%。

detailedSteps.en: Day 1 — Tube A: Dilute 3 µL Lipofectamine RNAiMAX into 47 µL Opti-MEM (for 24-well scale); mix gently and incubate 5 min at room temperature.
detailedSteps.zh: Day 1 — 管 A：将 3 µL Lipofectamine RNAiMAX 稀释至 47 µL Opti-MEM（24 孔板规模），轻混后室温孵育 5 min。

detailedSteps.en: Tube B: Dilute 1 µL of 20 µM siRNA into 49 µL Opti-MEM (final ~20 nM siRNA). For higher concentrations adjust accordingly.
detailedSteps.zh: 管 B：将 1 µL 20 µM siRNA 稀释至 49 µL Opti-MEM（终浓度约 20 nM）。如需更高浓度按比例调整。

detailedSteps.en: Combine Tube A and Tube B; mix gently by pipetting 3–5 times; incubate at room temperature for 20 min to form siRNA-lipid complexes.
detailedSteps.zh: 合并管 A 和管 B，轻柔吹打 3–5 次，室温孵育 20 min 形成 siRNA-脂质复合物。

detailedSteps.en: Aspirate cell medium; add 400 µL fresh antibiotic-free medium per 24-well; add 100 µL complex dropwise (total 500 µL). Gently rock plate to distribute. Do NOT change medium for at least 6 h.
detailedSteps.zh: 吸去旧培养基，每孔加 400 µL 新鲜无抗生素培养基，逐滴加入 100 µL 复合物（共 500 µL），轻摇培养板使其分布均匀。6 h 内不换液。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate at 37°C, 5% CO₂ for 48–72 h. Most targets: 72 h. Fast-turnover proteins: 48 h. Long-lived proteins: 96 h with a second transfection at 48 h.
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C、5% CO₂ 孵育 48–72 h。大多数靶标：72 h；快速周转蛋白：48 h；稳定蛋白：96 h，48 h 时再次转染。

detailedSteps.en: Verify knockdown efficiency by qPCR (mRNA level; expect ≥70% reduction) and/or Western blot (protein level; expect ≥60% reduction). Always include siNC and siGAPDH controls.
detailedSteps.zh: 通过 qPCR（mRNA 水平，预期 ≥70% 下调）和/或 Western blot（蛋白水平，预期 ≥60% 下调）验证敲低效率。始终包含 siNC 和 siGAPDH 对照。

detailedSteps.en: Proceed with downstream functional assays (proliferation, migration, apoptosis, etc.) at 48–72 h post-transfection when knockdown is confirmed.
detailedSteps.zh: 确认敲低效率后，在转染后 48–72 h 开展下游功能实验（增殖、迁移、凋亡等）。

note.en: After seeding on Day 0, cells incubate overnight; proceed with transfection reagent preparation next morning (Day 1).
note.zh: Day 0 铺板后细胞过夜孵育，次日早上（Day 1）准备转染试剂继续操作。

note.en: After transfection, cells incubate 48–72 h for knockdown; harvest time can be adjusted based on target protein half-life.
note.zh: 转染后细胞孵育 48–72 h 待敲低生效；收获时间可根据靶蛋白半衰期灵活调整。

usage.en: Knock down target gene expression using small interfering RNA (siRNA) transfection.
usage.zh: 小干扰 RNA（siRNA）转染敲低靶基因表达。
